reasoning: Lei Tingjie's FIDE rating, per the Wikipedia page revision of 2025-10-31, is 2569. This value will almost certainly remain her rating on 2025-11-09. A 1% increase requires her rating to reach at least 2595 (a massive gain of ~26 points). FIDE ratings are updated monthly. By Nov 16, her rating on the Wikipedia page will mathematically be exactly the same as on Nov 9, making the probability 0.05 (platform minimum). By Dec 9, the December 1 rating will be active. A 26-point gain in a single month is highly improbable for top-tier players, requiring performing about 2.6 points above expected score in a large tournament. By Feb 2026, roughly three FIDE rating periods will have passed, making such a swing more possible (larger variance over time), but it still represents essentially a two-standard-deviation jump for an established elite player. Thus, probabilities are scaled as 0.05, 0.07, 0.14.
